scripts.test: pnpm run test:sdk-ts && pnpm run test:sdk-py
scripts.data:check-new-models:test: cd scripts/model-discovery && pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.validate:docs: pnpm run docs:links && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.validate:web: pnpm run web:lint && pnpm run web:build
scripts.validate:api: pnpm run api:lint && pnpm run api:build
scripts.validate:packages: pnpm run packages:build:ts && pnpm run packages:pack:ts && pnpm run packages:build:py
scripts.openapi:gen:ts: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/ts.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen && tsx scripts/postprocess-ts-sdk.ts && rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/docs packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/.openapi-generator packages/sdk/sdk-ts/src/gen/.openapi-generator-ignore
scripts.openapi:gen:py: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/py.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen && rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/docs packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.openapi-generator packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.openapi-generator-ignore packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/README.md packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/requirements.txt packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/setup.py packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/setup.cfg packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/tox.ini packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/test-requirements.txt packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.github packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/test packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.gitignore packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.gitlab-ci.yml packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/.travis.yml packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/git_push.sh packages/sdk/sdk-py/src/gen/pyproject.toml
scripts.openapi:gen:go: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-go/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/go.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-go/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:csharp: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-csharp/src/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/csharp.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-csharp/src/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:php: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-php/src/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/php.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-php/src/gen
scripts.openapi:gen:ruby: rimraf packages/sdk/sdk-ruby/lib/gen && pnpm exec openapi-generator-cli generate -c apps/api/openapi/v1/ruby.codegen.yaml -o packages/sdk/sdk-ruby/lib/gen
scripts.openapi:gen: pnpm run openapi:gen:ts && pnpm run openapi:gen:py && pnpm run openapi:gen:go && pnpm run openapi:gen:csharp && pnpm run openapi:gen:php && pnpm run openapi:gen:ruby
scripts.changeset:version: pnpm exec changeset version && pnpm run sdk-py:sync-version
scripts.precommit: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run validate:data && pnpm run validate:pricing && pnpm run validate:gateway && pnpm run openapi:lint && pnpm run validate:docs && pnpm run validate:web && pnpm run validate:api && pnpm run validate:packages && (cd apps/web && pnpm run test) && pnpm run test
